strategy: Team gauntlet (four enemies). Hit Storm into Bison (+5%); avoid Myth (70%). He's stunable and beguilable — control him during setup.
Attacking Bison makes him retaliate for 20% of the attacker's max health, so only hit him with shields up and when committing the kill.
Blade the hitter with multi-target blades (Elemental/Spirit) — Ms. Felicity Disarms single blades cast on another wizard and Cleanse Wards single traps placed on other enemies.
Don't use Auras — Kenny Rooster natural-attacks (705) and destroys them.
Expect two-round Confusion on the team from round 1 onward; heal and push through. The minions execute each other under 20% health, so focus fire and let the chain thin them.
cheatNotes: Late wizards get Confused for two rounds — join on time.
Round 1 (and periodically) he Confuses every wizard for two rounds — expect fizzles and misdirected casts.
Attack Bison and he retaliates for 20% of the attacker's max health — only hit him with shields up and when finishing.
Cast a blade on another wizard and Ms. Felicity Disarms the receiver — use multi-target blades instead.
Multi-target blades don't trigger the Disarm.
Place a trap on another enemy and she Cleanse Wards it off.
A multi-trap spell only loses one trap to her.
If Kenny Rooster drops below 20% health she executes him.
Round 1 and every 5th round Daniel gives each wizard a junk Snake Oil card.
If Ms. Felicity drops below 20%, Daniel executes her.
Cast an Aura and Kenny natural-attacks for 705 and destroys the aura — don't use auras.
If Daniel drops below 20%, Kenny executes him.
